trans-unit.source: Enables collecting crash dump on expected as well as unexpected testhost exit.
trans-unit.target: 允許在測試主機如預期或未預期地結束時收集損毀傾印。

trans-unit.source:
Runs the tests in blame mode and collects a crash dump when the test host exits unexpectedly. This option depends on the version of .NET used, the type of error, and the operating system.
For exceptions in managed code, a dump will be automatically collected on .NET 5.0 and later versions. It will generate a dump for testhost or any child process that also ran on .NET 5.0 and crashed. Crashes in native code will not generate a dump. This option works on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Crash dumps in native code, or when targetting .NET Framework, or .NET Core 3.1 and earlier versions, can only be collected on Windows, by using Procdump. A directory that contains procdump.exe and procdump64.exe must be in the PATH or PROCDUMP_PATH environment variable.
The tools can be downloaded here: https://docs.microsoft.com/sysinternals/downloads/procdump
To collect a crash dump from a native application running on .NET 5.0 or later, the usage of Procdump can be forced by setting the VSTEST_DUMP_FORCEPROCDUMP environment variable to 1.
Implies --blame.
trans-unit.target:
以歸責模式執行測試，並在測試主機未預期地結束時收集損毀傾印。此選項取決於使用的 .NET 版本、錯誤類型和作業系統。
對於受控程式碼中的例外狀況，系統將自動在 .NET 5.0 及更新版本上收集傾印。其會為 testhost 或任何也在 .NET 5.0 上執行且毀損的子程序產生傾印。原生程式碼中的損毀將不會產生傾印。此選項適用於 Windows、macOS、和 Linux。
原生程式碼中的損毀傾印，或以 .NET Framework 或 .NET Core 3.1 和先前版本為目標時，則只能在 Windows 上使用 Procdump 進行收集。包含 procdump.exe 和 procdump64.exe 的目錄必須位在 PATH 或 PROCDUMP_PATH 環境變數中。
您可以在這裡下載工具: https://docs.microsoft.com/sysinternals/downloads/procdump
若要從執行 .NET 5.0 或更新版本的原生應用程式收集損毀傾印，您可透過將 VSTEST_DUMP_FORCEPROCDUMP 環境變數設定為 1，以強制使用 Procdump。
隱含 --blame。

trans-unit.source: The type of crash dump to be collected. Supported values are full (default) and mini. Implies --blame-crash.
trans-unit.target: 要收集的損毀傾印類型。支援的值為 full (預設值) 和 mini。表示 --blame-crash。

trans-unit.source:
Runs the tests in blame mode. This option is helpful in isolating problematic tests that cause the test host to crash or hang, but it does not create a memory dump by default.
When a crash is detected, it creates an sequence file in TestResults/guid/guid_Sequence.xml that captures the order of tests that were run before the crash.
Based on the additional settings, hang dump or crash dump can also be collected.
Example: Timeout the test run when test takes more than the default timeout of 1 hour, and collect crash dump when the test host exits unexpectedly. (Crash dumps require additional setup, see below.) dotnet test --blame-hang --blame-crash Example: Timeout the test run when a test takes more than 20 minutes and collect hang dump. dotnet test --blame-hang-timeout 20min
trans-unit.target:
以歸責模式執行測試。此選項有助於隔離造成測試主機當機或擱置的問題測試，但預設不會建立記憶體傾印。
偵測到當機時，它會在 TestResults/guid/guid_Sequence.xml 中建立序列檔案，以擷取當機前執行的測試順序。
根據其他設定，也可以收集擱置傾印或損毀傾印。
範例: 當測試所花的時間超過預設的 1 小時時，測試執行會逾時，當測試主機未預期地結束時，會收集損毀傾印。 (損毀傾印需要其他設定，請參閱下文。) dotnet 測試 --blame-hang --blame-crash 範例: 當測試需要超過 20 分鐘並收集擱置傾印時，測試執行會逾時。 dotnet 測試 --blame-hang-timeout 20min

trans-unit.source: Run the tests in blame mode and enables collecting hang dump when test exceeds the given timeout.
trans-unit.target: 當測試超過指定的逾時時，請在改動者模式中執行測試，並啟用收集停止回應傾印。

trans-unit.source: The type of crash dump to be collected. The supported values are full (default), mini, and none. When 'none' is used then test host is terminated on timeout, but no dump is collected. Implies --blame-hang.
trans-unit.target: 要收集之損毀傾印的類型。支援的值為完整的 full (預設值)，mini 和 none。若使用「none」，則測試主機將會在逾時時終止，不會收集任何傾印。表示 --blame-hang。

trans-unit.source: Per-test timeout, after which hang dump is triggered and the testhost process is terminated. Default is 1h. The timeout value is specified in the following format: 1.5h / 90m / 5400s / 5400000ms. When no unit is used (e.g. 5400000), the value is assumed to be in milliseconds. When used together with data driven tests, the timeout behavior depends on the test adapter used. For xUnit, NUnit and MSTest 2.2.4+ the timeout is renewed after every test case, For MSTest before 2.2.4, the timeout is used for all testcases.
trans-unit.target: 每個測試逾時，若超過時間未完成，將觸發擱置傾印，並終止 testhost 流程。預設值為 1 小時。 以下列格式指定逾時值: 1.5 小時 / 90 分鐘 / 5400 秒 / 5400000 毫秒。如果未使用單位 (例如 5400000)，則假設值為毫秒。 與資料驅動測試搭配使用時，逾時行為取決於所使用的測試配接器。針對 xUnit、NUnit 和 MSTest 2.2.4+ ，每次測試案例之後都會更新逾時， 針對 2.2.4 之前的 MSTest，系統會針對所有測試案例使用逾時。

trans-unit.source: CONFIG_FILE
trans-unit.target: CONFIG_FILE

trans-unit.source:
Sets the value of an environment variable. Creates the variable if it does not exist, overrides if it does. This argument can be specified multiple times to provide multiple variables.
Examples: -e VARIABLE=abc -e VARIABLE="value with spaces" -e VARIABLE="value;seperated with;semicolons" -e VAR1=abc -e VAR2=def -e VAR3=ghi
trans-unit.target:
設定環境變數的值。 若變數不存在，則加以建立; 若有，則予以覆寫。 此引數可多次指定，以提供多項變數。
範例: -e VARIABLE=abc -e VARIABLE="value with spaces" -e VARIABLE="value;seperated with;semicolons" -e VAR1=abc -e VAR2=def -e VAR3=ghi

trans-unit.source: Run tests that match the given expression. Examples: Run tests with priority set to 1: --filter "Priority = 1" Run a test with the specified full name: --filter "FullyQualifiedName=Namespace.ClassName.MethodName" Run tests that contain the specified name: --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Namespace.Class" See https://aka.ms/vstest-filtering for more information on filtering support.
trans-unit.target: 執行符合指定運算式的測試。 範例: 執行測試，而優先順序設為 1: --filter "Priority = 1" 使用指定的全名執行測試: --filter "FullyQualifiedName=Namespace.ClassName.MethodName" 執行內含指定名稱的測試: --filter "FullyQualifiedName~Namespace.Class" 如需篩選支援的詳細資訊，請參閱 https://aka.ms/vstest-filtering。

trans-unit.source: EXPRESSION
trans-unit.target: EXPRESSION

trans-unit.source:
Sets the value of an environment variable. Creates the variable if it does not exist, overrides if it does. This will force the tests to be run in an isolated process. This argument can be specified multiple times to provide multiple variables.
Examples: -e VARIABLE=abc -e VARIABLE="value with spaces" -e VARIABLE="value;seperated with;semicolons" -e VAR1=abc -e VAR2=def -e VAR3=ghi
trans-unit.target:
設定環境變數的值。 若變數不存在，則加以建立; 若有，則予以覆寫。 這會強制在隔離流程中執行測試。 此引數可多次指定，以提供多項變數。
範例: -e VARIABLE=abc -e VARIABLE="value with spaces" -e VARIABLE="value;seperated with;semicolons" -e VAR1=abc -e VAR2=def -e VAR3=ghi

trans-unit.source: The NuGet sources to use when searching for newer packages. Requires the '--outdated', '--deprecated' or '--vulnerable' option.
trans-unit.target: 搜尋較新的套件時，所使用的 NuGet 來源。需要 '--outdated'、'--deprecated' 或 '--vulnerable' 選項。

trans-unit.source: Package reference
trans-unit.target: 套件參考

trans-unit.source: Remove a NuGet package reference from the project.
trans-unit.target: 從專案移除 NuGet 套件參考。

trans-unit.source: The package reference to remove.
trans-unit.target: 要移除的套件參考。

trans-unit.source: Searches one or more package sources for packages that match a search term. If no sources are specified, all sources defined in the NuGet.Config are used.
trans-unit.target: 搜尋一或多個套件來源以尋找符合搜尋字詞的套件。如果未指定來源，則會使用 NuGet.Config 中定義的所有來源。

trans-unit.source: Include prerelease packages.
trans-unit.target: 包含發行前版本套件。

trans-unit.source: SearchTerm
trans-unit.target: SearchTerm

trans-unit.source: Search term to filter package names, descriptions, and tags. Used as a literal value. Example: `dotnet package search some.package`. See also `--exact-match`.
trans-unit.target: 搜尋字詞以篩選封裝名稱、描述和標籤。作為常值使用。範例: 'dotnet package search some.package'。另請參閱 `--exact-match`。

trans-unit.source: Skip
trans-unit.target: 跳過

trans-unit.source: Number of results to skip, to allow pagination. Default 0.
trans-unit.target: 要略過以允許分頁的結果數目。預設 0。

trans-unit.source: Take
trans-unit.target: 採用

trans-unit.source: Number of results to return. Default 20.
trans-unit.target: 要傳回的結果數。預設 20。

trans-unit.source: Only print the list of links to download without downloading.
trans-unit.target: 只列印要下載的連結清單，而不下載。

trans-unit.source: 'dotnet workload search version' has three functions depending on its argument: 1. If no argument is specified, it outputs a list of the latest released workload versions from this feature band. Takes the --take option to specify how many to provide and --format to alter the format. Example: dotnet workload search version --take 2 --format json [{"workloadVersion":"9.0.201"},{"workloadVersion":"9.0.200.1"}] 2. If a workload version is provided as an argument, it outputs a table of various workloads and their versions for the specified workload version. Takes the --format option to alter the output format. Example: dotnet workload search version 9.0.201 Workload manifest ID Manifest feature band Manifest Version ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ microsoft.net.workload.emscripten.current 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24430.3 microsoft.net.workload.emscripten.net6 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24430.3 microsoft.net.workload.emscripten.net7 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24430.3 microsoft.net.workload.emscripten.net8 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24430.3 microsoft.net.sdk.android 9.0.100-rc.1 35.0.0-rc.1.80 microsoft.net.sdk.ios 9.0.100-rc.1 17.5.9270-net9-rc1 microsoft.net.sdk.maccatalyst 9.0.100-rc.1 17.5.9270-net9-rc1 microsoft.net.sdk.macos 9.0.100-rc.1 14.5.9270-net9-rc1 microsoft.net.sdk.maui 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24453.9 microsoft.net.sdk.tvos 9.0.100-rc.1 17.5.9270-net9-rc1 microsoft.net.workload.mono.toolchain.current 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24431.7 microsoft.net.workload.mono.toolchain.net6 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24431.7 microsoft.net.workload.mono.toolchain.net7 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24431.7 microsoft.net.workload.mono.toolchain.net8 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24431.7 3. If one or more workloads are provided along with their versions (by joining them with the '@' character), it outputs workload versions that match the provided versions. Takes the --take option to specify how many to provide and --format to alter the format. Example: dotnet workload search version maui@9.0.0-rc.1.24453.9 ios@17.5.9270-net9-rc1 9.0.201
trans-unit.target: 根據其引數，'dotnet workload search version' 有三個函式: 1. 如果未指定引數，它會從此功能帶輸出最新發行工作負載版本的清單。使用 --take 選項來指定要提供多少個，以及使用 --format 來變更格式。 範例: dotnet workload search version --take 2 --format json [{"workloadVersion":"9.0.201"},{"workloadVersion":"9.0.200.1"}] 2. 如果提供工作負載版本做為引數，它會針對指定的工作負載版本輸出各種工作負載及其版本的表格。使用 --format 選項來變更輸出格式。 範例: dotnet workload search version 9.0.201 工作負載資訊清單識別碼 資訊清單功能帶 資訊清單版本 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ microsoft.net.workload.emscripten.current 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24430.3 microsoft.net.workload.emscripten.net6 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24430.3 microsoft.net.workload.emscripten.net7 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24430.3 microsoft.net.workload.emscripten.net8 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24430.3 microsoft.net.sdk.android 9.0.100-rc.1 35.0.0-rc.1.80 microsoft.net.sdk.ios 9.0.100-rc.1 17.5.9270-net9-rc1 microsoft.net.sdk.maccatalyst 9.0.100-rc.1 17.5.9270-net9-rc1 microsoft.net.sdk.macos 9.0.100-rc.1 14.5.9270-net9-rc1 microsoft.net.sdk.maui 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24453.9 microsoft.net.sdk.tvos 9.0.100-rc.1 17.5.9270-net9-rc1 microsoft.net.workload.mono.toolchain.current 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24431.7 microsoft.net.workload.mono.toolchain.net6 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24431.7 microsoft.net.workload.mono.toolchain.net7 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24431.7 microsoft.net.workload.mono.toolchain.net8 9.0.100-rc.1 9.0.0-rc.1.24431.7 3. 如果提供一或多個工作負載及其版本 (使用 '@' 字元聯結它們)，它會輸出符合所提供版本的工作負載版本。使用 --take 選項來指定要提供多少個，以及使用 --format 來變更格式。 範例: dotnet workload search version maui@9.0.0-rc.1.24453.9 ios@17.5.9270-net9-rc1 9.0.201

trans-unit.source: The project file to operate on. If a file is not specified, the command will search the current directory for one.
trans-unit.target: 要進行作業的專案檔。若未指定檔案，此命令將會搜尋目前的目錄以取得一個檔案。

trans-unit.source: Convert a file-based program to a project-based program.
trans-unit.target: 將檔案型程式轉換成專案型程式。

trans-unit.source: Delete all source files after conversion
trans-unit.target: 轉換後刪除所有來源檔案
trans-unit.note: This will delete the entry point file and all files included via #:include directives and default item globbing.

trans-unit.source: Determines changes without actually modifying the file system
trans-unit.target: 確定變更而不實際修改檔案系統

trans-unit.source: PROJECT_MANIFEST
trans-unit.target: PROJECT_MANIFEST

trans-unit.source: The XML file that contains the list of packages to be stored.
trans-unit.target: 包含要儲存之套件清單的 XML 檔案。

trans-unit.source: The project file or C# file-based app to operate on. If a file is not specified, the command will search the current directory for a project file.
trans-unit.target: 要執行的專案檔案或 C# 檔案型應用程式。若未指定檔案，命令就會在目前的目錄中搜尋專案或檔案。

trans-unit.source: PROJECT | FILE
trans-unit.target: 專案 | 檔案

trans-unit.source: Publisher for the .NET Platform
trans-unit.target: .NET 平台的發行者

trans-unit.source: The configuration to publish for. The default is 'Release' for NET 8.0 projects and above, but 'Debug' for older projects.
trans-unit.target: 要發佈的設定。.NET 8.0 專案及更新版本的預設值為 'Release'，但較舊專案的預設值為 'Debug'。

trans-unit.source: The target framework to publish for. The target framework has to be specified in the project file.
trans-unit.target: 要為其進行發佈的目標架構。該架構必須在專案檔中指定。

trans-unit.source: OUTPUT_DIR
trans-unit.target: OUTPUT_DIR

trans-unit.source: The output directory to place the published artifacts in.
trans-unit.target: 放置發佈之成品的輸出目錄。

trans-unit.source: The target runtime to publish for. This is used when creating a self-contained deployment. The default is to publish a framework-dependent application.
trans-unit.target: 要發佈至的目標執行階段。在建立獨立式部署時會使用此項目。 預設為發佈與 Framework 相依的應用程式。

trans-unit.source: Shut down the Razor build server.
trans-unit.target: 關閉 Razor 組建伺服器。

trans-unit.source: Add a project-to-project reference to the project.
trans-unit.target: 將專案對專案參考新增至專案。

trans-unit.source: Add the reference only when targeting a specific framework.
trans-unit.target: 只有在以特定架構為目標時才新增此參考。

trans-unit.source: The paths to the projects to add as references.
trans-unit.target: 到達要新增為參考之專案的路徑。

trans-unit.source: PROJECT_PATH
trans-unit.target: PROJECT_PATH

trans-unit.source: List all project-to-project references of the project.
trans-unit.target: 列出專案的所有專案對專案參考。

trans-unit.source: Remove a project-to-project reference from the project.
trans-unit.target: 從專案移除專案對專案參考。

trans-unit.source: Remove the reference only when targeting a specific framework.
trans-unit.target: 只有在以特定架構為目標時，才移除參考。

trans-unit.source: The paths to the referenced projects to remove.
trans-unit.target: 到達要移除之參考專案的路徑。

trans-unit.source: PROJECT_PATH
trans-unit.target: PROJECT_PATH

trans-unit.source: Remove one or more projects from a solution file.
trans-unit.target: 從解決方案檔移除一或多個專案。

trans-unit.source: The project paths or names to remove from the solution.
trans-unit.target: 要從解決方案移除的專案路徑或名稱。

trans-unit.source: PROJECT_PATH
trans-unit.target: PROJECT_PATH

trans-unit.source: Required command was not provided.
trans-unit.target: 未提供所需的命令。

trans-unit.target: .NET 相依性還原程式

trans-unit.source: Allow a .NET tool to roll forward to newer versions of the .NET runtime if the runtime it targets isn't installed.
trans-unit.target: 如果未安裝 .NET 執行階段目標，則允許 .NET 工具向前復原至較新版本的 .NET 執行階段。

trans-unit.source: .NET Run Command
trans-unit.target: .NET 執行命令

trans-unit.source: The configuration to run for. The default for most projects is 'Debug'.
trans-unit.target: 要為其執行的組態。大部分的專案預設為「偵錯」。

trans-unit.source: The target framework to run for. The target framework must also be specified in the project file.
trans-unit.target: 要為其執行的目標架構。該目標架構也必須在專案檔中指定。

trans-unit.source: The target runtime to run for.
trans-unit.target: 測試標的之目標執行階段。

trans-unit.target: RUNTIME_IDENTIFIER

trans-unit.source: Enable diagnostic output.
trans-unit.target: 啟用診斷輸出。

trans-unit.source: Display the command schema as JSON.
trans-unit.target: 以 JSON 格式顯示命令結構描述。

trans-unit.source: .NET SDK Command
trans-unit.target: .NET SDK 命令

trans-unit.source: .NET SDK Check Command
trans-unit.target: .NET SDK 檢查命令

trans-unit.source: The '--self-contained' and '--no-self-contained' options cannot be used together.
trans-unit.target: 不能同時使用 '--self-contained' 和 '--no-self-contained' 選項。

trans-unit.source: Publish the .NET runtime with your application so the runtime doesn't need to be installed on the target machine. The default is 'false.' However, when targeting .NET 7 or lower, the default is 'true' if a runtime identifier is specified.
trans-unit.target: 將 .NET 執行階段隨著您的應用程式發佈，以便您不需在目標電腦上安裝執行階段。 預設值為 'false'。不過，當目標為 .NET 7 或更低版本時，如有指定執行階段識別碼，則預設值為 'true'。

trans-unit.source: Skip updating the workload manifests.
trans-unit.target: 跳過更新工作負載資訊清單。

trans-unit.source: Skip the optimization phase.
trans-unit.target: 跳過最佳化階段。

trans-unit.source: Skip signature verification of workload packages and installers.
trans-unit.target: 略過工作負載套件和安裝程式的簽章驗證。

trans-unit.source: Skip creating symbol files which can be used for profiling the optimized assemblies.
trans-unit.target: 跳過建立符號檔，該檔案可用於分析最佳化組件。

trans-unit.source: Recursively add projects' ReferencedProjects to solution
trans-unit.target: 遞歸地將專案的 ReferencedProjects 新增至解決方案

trans-unit.source: .NET modify solution file command
trans-unit.target: .NET 修改方案檔命令

trans-unit.source: The solution file to operate on. If not specified, the command will search the current directory for one.
trans-unit.target: 要進行作業的解決方案檔。若未指定檔案，此命令將會搜尋目前的目錄以取得一個檔案。

trans-unit.source: SLN_FILE
trans-unit.target: SLN_FILE

trans-unit.source: The project or solution file to operate on. If a file is not specified, the command will search the current directory for one.
trans-unit.target: 要操作的專案或解決方案。若未指定檔案，命令就會在目前的目錄中搜尋一個檔案。

trans-unit.source: PROJECT | SOLUTION
trans-unit.target: PROJECT | SOLUTION

trans-unit.source: The project or solution or C# (file-based program) file to operate on. If a file is not specified, the command will search the current directory for a project or solution.
trans-unit.target: 要執行的專案或解決方案或 C# (基於檔案的程式) 檔案。若未指定檔案，命令就會在目前的目錄中搜尋專案或解決方案。

trans-unit.source: PROJECT | SOLUTION | FILE
trans-unit.target: 專案 | 解決方案 | 檔案

trans-unit.source: Source
trans-unit.target: 來源

trans-unit.source: The package source to search. You can pass multiple `--source` options to search multiple package sources. Example: `--source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json`.
trans-unit.target: 要搜尋的封裝來源。您可以傳遞多個 `--source` 選項來搜尋多個封裝來源。範例: `--source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json`。

trans-unit.source: Stores the specified assemblies for the .NET Platform. By default, these will be optimized for the target runtime and framework.
trans-unit.target: 儲存為 .NET 平台所指定的組件。根據預設，會為目標執行階段與架構，最佳化這些組件。

trans-unit.source: The target framework to store packages for. The target framework has to be specified in the project file.
trans-unit.target: 要對其儲存套件的目標架構。該目標架構必須在專案檔中指定。

trans-unit.source: OUTPUT_DIR
trans-unit.target: OUTPUT_DIR

trans-unit.source: The output directory to store the given assemblies in.
trans-unit.target: 儲存指定組件的輸出目錄。

trans-unit.source: The target runtime to store packages for.
trans-unit.target: 要對其儲存套件的目標執行階段。

trans-unit.source: Specify a temporary directory for this command to download and extract NuGet packages (must be secure).
trans-unit.target: 指定此命令的暫存目錄，以下載並解壓縮 NuGet 套件 (必須為安全)。

trans-unit.source: Displays a summary of what would happen if the given command line were run if it would result in a template creation.
trans-unit.target: 顯示如果執行所給予的命令列會導致範本建立，會發生什麼情況的摘要。

trans-unit.source: Forces content to be generated even if it would change existing files.
trans-unit.target: 強制產生內容，即使內容會變更現有的檔案。

trans-unit.source: The name for the output being created. If no name is specified, the name of the output directory is used.
trans-unit.target: 要建立的輸出名稱。如果未指定名稱，則使用輸出目錄的名稱。

trans-unit.source: Disables checking for the template package updates when instantiating a template.
trans-unit.target: 停用在具現化範本時檢查範本套件更新。

trans-unit.source: Run test(s), without displaying Microsoft Testplatform banner
trans-unit.target: 執行測試，但不顯示 Microsoft Testplatform 橫幅

trans-unit.source: OUTPUT_DIR
trans-unit.target: OUTPUT_DIR

trans-unit.source: The configuration to use for running tests. The default for most projects is 'Debug'.
trans-unit.target: 要用於執行測試的組態。大部分的專案預設為「偵錯」。

trans-unit.source: The target framework to run tests for. The target framework must also be specified in the project file.
trans-unit.target: 要為其執行測試的目標架構。該目標架構必須在專案檔中指定。

trans-unit.source: The target runtime to test for.
trans-unit.target: 要測試的目標執行時間。

trans-unit.source: Install or work with tools that extend the .NET experience.
trans-unit.target: 安裝或使用可擴充 .NET 體驗的工具。

trans-unit.source: Executes a tool from source without permanently installing it.
trans-unit.target: 從來源執行工具，但不永久性地安裝。

trans-unit.source: Add an additional NuGet package source to use during installation.
trans-unit.target: 新增於安裝期間要使用的額外 NuGet 套件來源。

trans-unit.source: ADDSOURCE
trans-unit.target: ADDSOURCE

trans-unit.source: Install global or local tool. Local tools are added to manifest and restored.
trans-unit.target: 安裝全域或本機工具。本機工具會新增至資訊清單，並會還原。

trans-unit.source: The NuGet configuration file to use.
trans-unit.target: 要使用的 NuGet 組態檔。

trans-unit.source: FILE
trans-unit.target: 檔案

trans-unit.source: The target framework to install the tool for.
trans-unit.target: 要為工具安裝的目標 Framework。

trans-unit.source: FRAMEWORK
trans-unit.target: 架構

trans-unit.source: Install the tool for the current user.
trans-unit.target: 為目前的使用者安裝工具。

trans-unit.source: Install the tool and add to the local tool manifest (default).
trans-unit.target: 安裝工具，並將其新增至本機工具資訊清單 (預設)。

trans-unit.source: Path to the manifest file.
trans-unit.target: 資訊清單檔的路徑。

trans-unit.source: PATH
trans-unit.target: 路徑

trans-unit.source: Replace all NuGet package sources to use during installation with these.
trans-unit.target: 以這些套件取代安裝期間使用的所有 NuGet 套件來源。

trans-unit.source: SOURCE
trans-unit.target: 資料來源

trans-unit.source: The directory where the tool will be installed. The directory will be created if it does not exist.
trans-unit.target: 安裝工具所在的目錄。若該目錄不存在，則會建立該目錄。

trans-unit.source: PATH
trans-unit.target: 路徑

trans-unit.source: The version of the tool package to install.
trans-unit.target: 要安裝之工具套件的版本。

trans-unit.source: VERSION
trans-unit.target: 版本

trans-unit.source: List tools installed globally or locally.
trans-unit.target: 列出已安裝在全域或本機的工具。

trans-unit.source: The output format for the list of tools.
trans-unit.target: 工具清單的輸出格式。

trans-unit.source: List tools installed for the current user.
trans-unit.target: 列出已為目前使用者安裝的工具。

trans-unit.source: List the tools installed in the local tool manifest.

trans-unit.source: Restore tools defined in the local tool manifest.
trans-unit.target: 還原本機工具資訊清單中所定義的工具。

trans-unit.source: Path to the manifest file.

trans-unit.target: 轉發到工具的引數

trans-unit.source: Search term from package id or package description. Require at least one character.

trans-unit.target: 跳過

trans-unit.source: Uninstall a global tool or local tool.
trans-unit.target: 解除安裝全域工具或本機工具。

trans-unit.source: Uninstall the tool from the current user's tools directory.
trans-unit.target: 從目前使用者的工具目錄，解除安裝工具。

trans-unit.source: Uninstall the tool and remove it from the local tool manifest.
trans-unit.target: 解除安裝該工具，並將其從本機工具資訊清單中移除。

trans-unit.source: Path to the manifest file.
trans-unit.target: 資訊清單檔的路徑。

trans-unit.source: The directory containing the tool to uninstall.
trans-unit.target: 包含要解除安裝之工具的目錄。

trans-unit.source: Update a global or local tool.
trans-unit.target: 更新全域或本機工具。

trans-unit.source: Unrecognized command or argument '{0}'
trans-unit.target: 無法辨識的命令或引數 '{0}'

trans-unit.source: Update all tools.
trans-unit.target: 更新所有工具。

trans-unit.source: Controls whether updates should look for workload sets or the latest version of each individual manifest.
trans-unit.target: 控制更新是否應尋找工作負載集或每個單獨資訊清單的最新版本。

trans-unit.source: Shut down the VB/C# compiler build server.
trans-unit.target: 關閉 VB/C# 編譯器組建伺服器。

trans-unit.source: Cannot specify --version when the package argument already contains a version.
trans-unit.target: 當套件引數已包含版本時，無法指定 --version。

trans-unit.source: Verbosity
trans-unit.target: 詳細程度

trans-unit.source: Display this amount of details in the output: `normal`, `minimal`, `detailed`. The default is `normal`
trans-unit.target: 在輸出中顯示此詳細資料量: `normal`、`minimal`、`detailed`。預設為 `normal`

trans-unit.source: Set the MSBuild verbosity level. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic].
trans-unit.target: 設定 MSBuild 的詳細程度層級。允許的值為 q[uiet]、m[inimal]、n[ormal]、d[etailed] 及 diag[nostic]。

trans-unit.source: Sets the verbosity level. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], and diag[nostic].
trans-unit.target: 設定詳細資訊層級。允許的值為 q[uiet]、m[inimal]、n[ormal] 和 diag[nostic]。

trans-unit.source: VERSION_SUFFIX
trans-unit.target: VERSION_SUFFIX

trans-unit.source: Removes workload components that may have been left behind from previous updates and uninstallations.
trans-unit.target: 移除先前更新和解除安裝中可能遺漏的工作負載元件。

trans-unit.source: Install or work with workloads that extend the .NET experience.
trans-unit.target: 安裝或使用可提升 .NET 體驗的工作負載。

trans-unit.source: Modify or display workload configuration values. To display a value, specify the corresponding command-line option without providing a value. For example: "dotnet workload config --update-mode"
trans-unit.target: 修改或顯示工作負載設定值。 若要顯示值，請指定對應的命令列選項而不提供值。 例如: "dotnet workload config --update-mode"

trans-unit.source: Start the elevated server process to facilitate MSI based installations.
trans-unit.target: 啟動提升權限的伺服器處理序，以輔助 MSI 型安裝。

trans-unit.source: Shows a history of workload installation actions.
trans-unit.target: 顯示工作負載安裝動作的歷程記錄。

trans-unit.source: The NuGet package ID of the workload to install.
trans-unit.target: 要安裝工作負載的 NuGet 套件識別碼。

trans-unit.source: WORKLOAD_ID
trans-unit.target: WORKLOAD_ID

trans-unit.source: The text to search for in the IDs and descriptions of available workloads.
trans-unit.target: 要在可用工作負載的識別碼和描述中搜尋的文字。

trans-unit.source: SEARCH_STRING
trans-unit.target: SEARCH_STRING

trans-unit.source: Display information about installed workloads.
trans-unit.target: 顯示已安裝工作負載的相關資訊。

trans-unit.source: Install one or more workloads.
trans-unit.target: 安裝一或多個工作負載。

trans-unit.source: The NuGet configuration file to use.
trans-unit.target: 要使用的 NuGet 組態檔。

trans-unit.source: FILE
trans-unit.target: 檔案

trans-unit.source: The NuGet package source to use during the restore. To specify multiple sources, repeat the option.
trans-unit.target: 還原期間要使用的 NuGet 套件資料來源。若要指定多個來源，請重複選項。

trans-unit.source: SOURCE
trans-unit.target: 資料來源

trans-unit.source: The version of the SDK.
trans-unit.target: SDK 的版本。

trans-unit.source: VERSION
trans-unit.target: 版本

trans-unit.source: List workloads available.
trans-unit.target: 列出可用的工作負載。

trans-unit.source: Repair workload installations.
trans-unit.target: 修復工作負載安裝。

trans-unit.source: Restore workloads required for a project.
trans-unit.target: 還原專案所需的工作負載。

trans-unit.source: Search for available workloads.
trans-unit.target: 搜尋可用的工作負載。

trans-unit.source: A workload version to display or one or more workloads and their versions joined by the '@' character.
trans-unit.target: 要顯示的工作負載版本，或是一或多個工作負載及其由 '@' 字元連接的版本。

trans-unit.source: Uninstall one or more workloads.
trans-unit.target: 解除安裝一或多個工作負載。

trans-unit.source: Update all installed workloads.
trans-unit.target: 更新所有已安裝的工作負載。

trans-unit.source: WORKLOAD_VERSION
trans-unit.target: WORKLOAD_VERSION

trans-unit.source: Output workload manifest versions associated with the provided workload version.
trans-unit.target: 與提供的工作負載版本相關聯的輸出工作負載資訊清單版本。

trans-unit.source: Display the currently installed workload version.
trans-unit.target: 顯示目前安裝的工作負載版本。

trans-unit.source: Accept all confirmation prompts using "yes."
trans-unit.target: 使用「是」，以接受所有確認提示。

trans-unit.source: The friendly name of the data collector to use for the test run. More info here: https://aka.ms/vstest-collect
trans-unit.target: 用於測試執行的資料收集器之易記名稱。 此處提供詳細資訊: https://aka.ms/vstest-collect

trans-unit.source: DATA_COLLECTOR_NAME
trans-unit.target: DATA_COLLECTOR_NAME
